task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the eQUEST application open with the '4StoreyBuilding' project loaded (visible in the title bar or project tree).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the HVAC systems for the top floor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent viewing the Air-Side HVAC system components, specifically targeting the systems with the 'T.' prefix (T.S31, T.E32, T.N33, T.W34, T.C35).

task_completion.description: Update the MIN-OUTSIDE-AIR parameter to 0.30 for the target systems.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the HVAC system properties or spreadsheet view showing the 'Minimum Outside Air' (or MIN-OUTSIDE-AIR) field set to 0.30 for the 'T.' prefixed systems.

task_completion.description: Set RECOVER-EXHAUST to YES and ERV-RECOVER-TYPE to ENTHALPY.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the exhaust recovery option enabled ('YES') and the recovery type selected as 'ENTHALPY' in the system properties dialog or spreadsheet.

task_completion.description: Set ERV-SENSIBLE-EFF to 0.76 and ERV-LATENT-EFF to 0.65.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the sensible effectiveness ratio set to 0.76 and the latent effectiveness ratio set to 0.65 for the target systems.
Screenshots showing the eQUEST simulation dialog, progress bar, or the simulation completion summary screen indicating the annual simulation was executed.
Screenshots showing the agent clicking the save icon, using the File -> Save menu, or a confirmation dialog indicating the project has been saved.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the eQUEST graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with eQUEST dialog boxes, menus, and spreadsheet views, rather than a text editor modifying the .inp file directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent modified the correct systems despite the misleading task description.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must modify systems starting with 'T.' (T.S31, T.E32, etc.). Modifying non-existent '3.' systems or guessing wrong systems indicates failure to properly inspect the model.

integrity.description: Ensure the simulation was genuinely executed within the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of the actual eQUEST calculation/simulation window with progress indicators or results, not just a terminal command or skipped step.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CRITICAL: The task description incorrectly states the target systems start with '3.'. The actual 5 systems for the 3rd/top floor in the 4StoreyBuilding model start with 'T' (T.S31, T.E32, T.N33, T.W34, T.C35). The agent must discover this and modify the 'T' prefixed systems. Target parameters to verify: MIN-OUTSIDE-AIR = 0.30, RECOVER-EXHAUST = YES, ERV-RECOVER-TYPE = ENTHALPY, ERV-SENSIBLE-EFF = 0.76, ERV-LATENT-EFF = 0.65. The agent must also run the annual simulation and save the project.
